violations.text: The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. At time of inspection, no sanitizer was available. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. At time of inspection, chicken and steak were cooling in covered containers. Reviewed cooling procedures with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
The handwashing sink next to the walk-in cooler is in poor repair. Leak observed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024
The prep sink is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024

The low boy cold hold unit located in the front area was not in good repair. The ambient air temperature was observed at 51 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Per owner, a technician will be here to service the unit this afternoon. Please email inspector proof of repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
